core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix swiss design with tech utility.
Emotion First: Trust and Clarity via deep blues and whitespace.
Content is King: Every pixel serves the narrative.
Negative Space: Luxurious spacing (p-12, p-24) to frame content.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all hover:translate-y-[-2px] shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary/20 hover:border-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium

cards.marketing: bg-white border border-border p-8 rounded-2xl hover:border-secondary/50 transition-colors duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-border p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance. Size 24px default.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE index.css: Replace all root variables with the HSL values provided in the 'colors' section. Do NOT use the default Shadcn zinc colors.
2. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
3. TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the font family in tailwind.config.js to include 'Outfit' (sans) and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' (body).
4. MARKETING PAGE: Build a 'Bento Grid' layout for the Services section using the layout_strategies provided.
5. DASHBOARD: Create a 'SidebarLayout' component. Use the 'muted' color for the dashboard main background and 'white' for the content cards.
6. ANIMATIONS: Implement 'framer-motion' for simple entrance animations (fade-up) on the Landing Page text and images. Add hover states to all cards.
7. COMPONENTS: Use existing Shadcn components but override their styles via className to match the 'buttons' and 'inputs' specs defined here.
8. RESPONSIVENESS: Ensure all grids collapse to 1 column on mobile (grid-cols-1).
9. IMAGES: Use the provided URLs. Do NOT use placeholders.
10. TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and links.
universal_guidelines: Always tint greys with a bit of blue (cool grey).
